name: zsazsa-daily-briefing
description: Daily Threat Briefing metadata managed by the zsazsa CTI program

story-count.description: Number of stories in the briefing

escalations.description: Items escalated to flash alert, or None

geographic-scope.description: Additional geographic scope items added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

sectors.description: Additional sector scope items added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

threat-actors.description: Additional threat actor scope items added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

mitre-attack-techniques.description: Additional MITRE ATT&CK techniques added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

threat-types.description: Additional threat types added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

technology.description: Additional technology scope items added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

vendor.description: Additional vendor scope items added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

incident.description: Additional incident references added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

campaign.description: Additional campaign references added at briefing level (JSON-encoded list)

creator.description: User who created this briefing (set at creation, not editable)
